understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to place each selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+', with all goals simultaneously occupied by pieces to achieve WIN and progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces are selected and moved by clicking on valid target positions; movement occurs between accessible grid cells like [12,21] and [18,21] if no obstacles block the path, but repeated clicks on the same position may have no effect if blocked; walls and obstacles prevent movement; actions consume steps from a finite per-level budget, ending the run when depleted.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to place each selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+', with all goals simultaneously occupied by pieces to achieve WIN and progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces are selected and moved by clicking on valid target positions; movement occurs between accessible grid cells like [12,21] and [18,21] if no obstacles block the path, but repeated clicks on the same position may have no effect if blocked; walls and obstacles prevent movement; actions consume steps from a finite per-level budget, ending the run when depleted.
